commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh The kings of Tarshish and of the coasts shall bring presents: the kings of Sheba and Seba shall offer gifts. Earth, is omitted in Hebrew, Roman Septuagint, so that this cannot regard Solomon, (Berthier) though he was reverenced by all the neighbouring kings, 3 Kings x. Christ alone is the universal king, (Apocalypse xix. , and Philippians ii. ; Calmet) to whom every knee shall bend, at least when all shall appear in judgment. Many kings shall submit before.
